sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100690" key="sunisqmi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνισθμίζω</orth>, <sense id="n100690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">form an isthmus</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρὸς τὴν Ποντικήν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0068.tlg001:371" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Scymn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">371</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
